summary: Trading popup refinements and cleaner top-bar interaction polish.
release_notes: Updated Share Card stat label from AVG WIN /SH to AVG WIN /SHARE.
Aligned trading popup section header heights across Positions, Time & Sales, Orders, and Hotkeys for consistent layout.
Reduced Positions table display minimum height to tighten vertical spacing.
Removed market session indicator from the top header clock so it shows time + ET only.
Refined Trade button hover behavior: bolt now switches to steady light-on mode while hover is active and flash animation pauses.
Cleaned Trade button hover background by removing the external green halo so hover effect stays inside the button.
